description_wiki: Germany, officially the Federal Republic of Germany, is a country in Western and Central Europe.

description: one of the four autonomous countries of the Kingdom of the Netherlands; with territories in the Caribbean
description_wiki: The Netherlands, informally Holland, is a country in Northwestern Europe, with overseas territories in the Caribbean.

description: paratrooper branch of the German Luftwaffe in the Third Reich
description_wiki: The Fallschirmjäger (German: [ˈfalʃɪʁmˌjɛːɡɐ] ) were the airborne forces branch of the Luftwaffe before and during World War II. They were the first paratroopers to be committed in large-scale airborne operations.

description: city in South Holland, the Netherlands
description_wiki: Rotterdam ( ROT-ər-dam, UK also  ROT-ər-DAM; Dutch: [ˌrɔtərˈdɑm] ) is the second-largest city in the Netherlands by population and the largest by area (319.4 km2).

surface_forms: American consulate was destroyed in Rotterdam

description: German-born Dutch Jewish diarist and Holocaust victim (1929–1945)
Nazi paramilitary organization (1925–45) with the Waffen-SS as a military branch; conducted the mass murder of the European Jews (holocaust)
description_wiki:
The Schutzstaffel (German: [ˈʃʊtsˌʃtafl̩] ; lit. 'Protection Squadron'; SS; also stylised with SS runes as ᛋᛋ) was a major paramilitary organisation under Adolf Hitler and the Nazi Party in Nazi Germany, and later throughout German-occupied Europe during World War II.
It began with a small guard unit known as the Saal-Schutz ("Hall Security") made up of party volunteers to provide security for party meetings in Munich.

description: city and municipality in the Netherlands
description_wiki: Delft (Dutch pronunciation: [ˈdɛl(ə)ft] ) is a city and municipality in the province of South Holland, Netherlands.

description: city and municipality in the Netherlands, seat of the Dutch government
description_wiki: The Hague (Dutch: Den Haag) is the capital city of the South Holland province of the Netherlands.
Sluis (Dutch: [slœys] ; Zeelandic: Sluus [slys]; French: Écluse) is a city and municipality located in the west of Zeelandic Flanders, in the south-western Dutch province of Zeeland.

description: city, municipality and capital of province Limburg, the Netherlands
description_wiki: Maastricht ( MAH-strikht, US also  mah-STRIKHT, Dutch: [maːˈstrɪxt] ; Limburgish: Mestreech [məˈstʀeːx]) is a city and a municipality in the southeastern Netherlands.
Aachen is the 13th-largest city in North Rhine-Westphalia and the 27th-largest city of Germany, with around 261,000 inhabitants.
Operation Market Garden was an Allied military operation during the Second World War fought in the German-occupied Netherlands from 17 to 25 September 1944.

description: city, municipality and capital of province Gelderland, the Netherlands
description_wiki: Arnhem (Dutch: [ˈɑrnɛm]  or [ˈɑr(ə)nɦɛm] ; German: Arnheim [ˈaʁnhaɪm] ; Ernems: Èrnem) is a city and municipality situated in the eastern part of the Netherlands, near the German border.

description: president of the United States from 1953 to 1961 (1890–1969)
description_wiki: Dwight David "Ike" Eisenhower (born David Dwight Eisenhower; October 14, 1890 – March 28, 1969) was the 34th president of the United States, serving from 1953 to 1961.
The Ordnungspolizei (Orpo, German: [ˈɔʁdnʊŋspoliˌtsaɪ], meaning 'Order Police') were the uniformed police force in Nazi Germany from 1936 to 1945.
Oldebroek (Dutch pronunciation: [ˌɔldəˈbruk] ) is a municipality and a town in the province of Gelderland.
